title: Ücret ve Yan Haklar Analitiği
description: Mercer/WTW standardında kapsamlı ücretlendirme analizi — iç denge, cinsiyet eşitliği, yüzdelik dağılımlar, trend, APQC HC-3 ve ISO 30414 metrikleri

aggregate.select: (SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0)

trend.select: (SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 2 AND SALARY > 0)

aggregate.select: AVG(CASE WHEN dept_med.dept_median > 0 THEN SALARY / dept_med.dept_median ELSE NULL END)
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEPARTMENT_ID, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER(PARTITION BY DEPARTMENT_ID) AS dept_median FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr2 INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep2 ON ep2.PUANTAJ_ID = epr2.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep2.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep2.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr2.SALARY > 0) dept_med ON dept_med.DEPARTMENT_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].DEPARTMENT_ID

aggregate.select: 1.0 - (AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END), 0))
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

trend.where: PUANTAJ_ID IN (SELECT PUANTAJ_ID FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] WHERE SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 2)

aggregate.select: AVG(CASE WHEN prev.SALARY > 0 THEN (cur.SALARY - prev.SALARY) / prev.SALARY ELSE NULL END)
aggregate.join: (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) prev ON cur.EMPLOYEE_ID = prev.EMPLOYEE_ID

aggregate.select: (SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) / NULLIF((SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.10) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0), 0)

trend.where: PUANTAJ_ID IN (SELECT PUANTAJ_ID FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] WHERE SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 2)

aggregate.select: (SELECT (2.0 * SUM(rn * s.SALARY) / (cnt * SUM(s.SALARY))) - ((cnt + 1.0) / cnt) FROM (SELECT SALARY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SALARY) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) s GROUP BY cnt)

CASE WHEN SALARY < 20000 THEN '0-20K' WHEN SALARY < 40000 THEN '20-40K' WHEN SALARY < 60000 THEN '40-60K' WHEN SALARY < 80000 THEN '60-80K' WHEN SALARY < 100000 THEN '80-100K' WHEN SALARY < 150000 THEN '100-150K' ELSE '150K+' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN SALARY < 20000 THEN '0-20K' WHEN SALARY < 40000 THEN '20-40K' WHEN SALARY < 60000 THEN '40-60K' WHEN SALARY < 80000 THEN '60-80K' WHEN SALARY < 100000 THEN '80-100K' WHEN SALARY < 150000 THEN '100-150K' ELSE '150K+' END

aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END) AS value, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

aggregate.select: CASE ed.LAST_SCHOOL WHEN 1 THEN 'İlkokul' WHEN 8 THEN 'Ortaokul' WHEN 2 THEN 'Lise' WHEN 9 THEN 'Meslek Lisesi' WHEN 3 THEN 'Önlisans' WHEN 4 THEN 'Lisans' WHEN 10 THEN 'Mühendislik' WHEN 11 THEN 'Fakülte' WHEN 5 THEN 'Yüksek Lisans' WHEN 6 THEN 'Doktora' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

aggregate.select: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2) AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value, COUNT(EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value2
aggregate.where: (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) OR (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 AND ep.SAL_MON >= MONTH(GETDATE()))) AND ep.SAL_MON <= CASE WHEN ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN MONTH(GETDATE())-1 ELSE 12 END AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.groupBy: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2)

aggregate.select: CASE epos.COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value, COUNT(*) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 1 THEN '0-1 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 3 THEN '1-3 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 5 THEN '3-5 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 10 THEN '5-10 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 15 THEN '10-15 yıl' ELSE '15+ yıl' END AS label, AVG([workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY) AS value
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY > 0 AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 1 THEN '0-1 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 3 THEN '1-3 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 5 THEN '3-5 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 10 THEN '5-10 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 15 THEN '10-15 yıl' ELSE '15+ yıl' END

aggregate.select: 'Toplam Brut' AS label, SUM(SALARY) AS value
ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, MIN(SALARY) AS min_val, AVG(SALARY) AS value, MAX(SALARY) AS max_val
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
